title: Add AI Art Gallery to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: A new wing in the gallery
gist.blurb: The community just shipped a beautiful new AI Art Gallery powered by Pollinations. Generate, remix, and download your digital masterpieces in one cozy spot.
gist.summary: Added the community-built AI Art Gallery to the Pollinations app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore a new community tool dedicated to generating, varying, and downloading AI artwork.
gist.visual_concept: An art gallery setting. Polly the Bee acting as an artist or curator, wearing a tiny painter's beret. The Monitor Robot admiring the framed pixel art on the wall.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hanging a glowing framed picture in a digital art gallery. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head looks at the art happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hanging a glowing framed picture in a digital art gallery. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head looks at the art happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
